feed.title: Morse Code Podcast
feed.subtitle: An automated podcast to help with learning Morse Code.

entry.content: Q: What’s the difference betweeen USL and the Graf Zeppelin?A: The Graf Zeppelin represented cutting edge technology for its time.
entry.summary: Q: What’s the difference betweeen USL and the Graf Zeppelin?A: The Graf Zeppelin represented cutting edge technology for its time.

entry.content: A few hours grace before the madness begins again.
entry.summary: A few hours grace before the madness begins again.

entry.content: You will have a long and unpleasant discussion with your supervisor.
entry.summary: You will have a long and unpleasant discussion with your supervisor.

entry.content: Consider well the proportions of things. It is better to be a young June-bugthan an old bird of paradise. – Mark Twain, Pudd’nhead Wilson’s Calendar
entry.summary: Consider well the proportions of things. It is better to be a young June-bugthan an old bird of paradise. – Mark Twain, Pudd’nhead Wilson’s Calendar

entry.content: You will have long and healthy life.
entry.summary: You will have long and healthy life.

entry.content: The Public is merely a multiplied me. – Mark Twain
entry.summary: The Public is merely a multiplied me. – Mark Twain

entry.content: Q: Why was Stonehenge abandoned?A: It wasn’t IBM compatible.
entry.summary: Q: Why was Stonehenge abandoned?A: It wasn’t IBM compatible.

entry.content: No violence, gentlemen – no violence, I beg of you! Consider the furniture! – Sherlock Holmes
entry.summary: No violence, gentlemen – no violence, I beg of you! Consider the furniture! – Sherlock Holmes

entry.content: You feel a whole lot more like you do now than you did when you used to.
entry.summary: You feel a whole lot more like you do now than you did when you used to.
